title: The National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2013

WMWWWm—rfi, afimfit M)fifim1996(mmmmrfiw WWWéwfiWfi r11:: lakmfimfiafaa “—fizmzwfiafimm 31211617 "fimfizz—afiwfifimafiqfiimaw ahfians afivawxfiufifim’mfifiwfiafi 353 Gl/ZOI3 mfifiuffiamm%azffiffiafimafwfifi afiufifimmmmgfirfigfifimmm Wwfifl’fafigfimfifiafifimww mlmmw‘imm/fimfiaafwfivfi afimmmmwmvfifimafia Wwfimmaafwfim {cm MWMfiafififimfiafiafiWafi WfiWWmm1 ET.WW1§3,W(W) [firmnwmnywj W Famnfim f‘afivmraafi mam 1115111 WW420H/l/9SMWH mm 11121191, 1996WW$W,SWI¥W, 11171 111, 15111313111191 11 mi, 1996 11' mmafim’vfiafizwfinamm straw man Wm/Hmun/ 2012*Q'1131R'AI (EDEN), mfia 22W,2012mmwmfim WEEIT‘W,WW,WTHIEUE4, WMWJMLIYWM 112119111 Wm wafifiwafiafilfimfimwafi‘éawmfi ahwfiwémmmwmmfimfifié umafiufima -- 1 of 2 -- 2 WTH " NATIONAL HIGHWAYS AUTHORITY OF INDIA NOTlFICATION New Delhi, the 24th January, 2013 The National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2013 No. NHAI/l1011/17/2012-HR.I(V0I.IX).—1n exercise of the powers conferred by Section 35, read with Section 9, of the National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988 (68 of 1988), the National Highways Authority of India hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Regulations, 1996, namely :« 1, Short title and commencement—(1) These regulations may he called the National Highways Authority ofIndia (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2013. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. 1n the Schedule to the National Highways Authority of 1ndia (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Regulations, 1996 (hereinafter referred to as the principal regulations), after Note 1, the following note shall be inserted, namely z~ 2,131va OF 1 131A: EXTRAORDINARY “Note 2 :—~Wherever the promotion is prescribed as a mode of recruitment in Column 5 and/or 8 of the schedule for the technical posts, a certain degree of parity he maintained while considering the absorbed officials for promotion vis-a-vis officials who may come on deputation While considering promotion ofinternal/absorbed candidates for next higher posts, number of years being put by the corresponding equivalent officers in MoRT&H for promotion in their particular category may be kept as a benchmark for eligibility for promotion.” Dr. J, N. SINGH, Member (Administration) [ADVT 111/ 1V/1 22/ 1 2/Exty.] Foot Note,——The principal regulations were published vide notification No. NllAR-12011/1/95-Admn., dated 11th March, 1996, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part 111, Section 4, dated the 11th March, 1996 and last amended vide notification No.NHA1/11011/17/2012-1-1R1 (VOLV), dated 22nd November, 2012, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part ill-Section 4, dated the 2y3rd November, 2012. Explanatory Memorandum Anything done or omitted to be done prior to notification of this amendment shall not be affected by promulgation of this amendment.
